ogTitle: Chetwynd vs Chewton Bushlands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chetwynd and Chewton Bushlands.
heading: Chetwynd vs Chewton Bushlands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chetwynd, Victoria and Chewton Bushlands, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chetwynd has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Chewton Bushlands (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chetwynd or Chewton Bushlands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chetwynd has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Chewton Bushlands scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chetwynd scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Chewton Bushlands scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chetwynd or Chewton Bushlands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chetwynd has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
